notes: Section 695, , , , authorized Gallaudet College to operate Kendall School as a demonstration elementary school for the deaf. See .Pub. L. 91–587, § 184 Stat. 1579section 4311 of this titleDec. 24, 1970
Section 695a, , , , defined “elementary school” and “construction”. See .Pub. L. 91–587, § 284 Stat. 1579section 4351 of this titleDec. 24, 1970
Section 695b, , , , authorized appropriations for establishment and operation, including construction and equipment, of demonstration elementary school.Pub. L. 91–587, § 384 Stat. 1579Dec. 24, 1970
Section 695c, , , , related to design and construction of facilities of demonstration elementary school.Pub. L. 91–587, § 484 Stat. 1579Dec. 24, 1970
